prompt:
STYLE: clean premium wellness-brand PRODUCT HERO SHOT on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Apple / Athletic Greens product-page aesthetic. Generous breathing room.

HERO SUBJECT — centered: photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible: 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in vertical teal strip, gold lid on top, jar closed). A small ceramic dish next to the jar with 4-5 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES.

FLOATING INGREDIENT CALLOUTS — three clean ingredient cards arranged around the jar (upper-left, right, lower-left). Each card has:
  • A PHOTOREALISTIC 3D-RENDERED VISUAL of the ingredient (NOT a line-art drawing, NOT a flat illustration — actual photoreal 3D-rendered product imagery with realistic textures, lighting, and shadows):
     – SEA MOSS: a photoreal bundle of fresh red-purple sea moss fronds with realistic translucency, water beads, soft natural light catching the curls
     – BURDOCK ROOT: a photoreal whole burdock root with realistic earthy textures, a clean cross-section showing the pale interior, soft natural light
     – DANDELION: a photoreal cluster of yellow dandelion flowers with realistic petal detail and a few green leaves, soft natural light
  • A chevron-shaped teal callout with a bold ALL-CAPS ingredient name and dosage:
     – SEA MOSS · 250mg
     – BURDOCK ROOT · 150mg
     – DANDELION · 100mg
  • One tiny sub-line in light-gray (4-5 words):
     SEA MOSS: '92 essential minerals'
     BURDOCK ROOT: 'Natural detox support'
     DANDELION: 'Liver + vitamin boost'
  Thin gold connector lines from each callout toward the jar.

TOP — bold ALL-CAPS headline in deep ink-black: 'THREE BOTANICALS, ONE GUMMY.' Thin gold rule beneath.
BOTTOM — tracked light-gray all-caps tagline: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE'.

DESIGN SYSTEM: pure clean white background with subtle warm-gray paper texture · accent muted TEAL/CYAN + warm GOLD/YELLOW + deep INK-BLACK + warm-gray sub-text · bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines, clean modern sans-serif for body · NO script fonts · photoreal 3D-rendered ingredient visuals (not drawings).

ABSOLUTE RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 square 4K · pure white background · NO border/frame · reference image for brand color/type and jar appearance · ingredient visuals must be PHOTOREALISTIC 3D RENDERS, not line-art illustrations.
